clusters.name: llm_supporting_not_rm_driven
clusters.description: LLM used as supporting component in MLOps/DevOps/e-commerce workflows, not for autonomous resource management decisions.
example_titles: Real-Time ML and LLM Optimization: Orchestrating Scalable Workflows in Distributed Commerce Environments
GAIKube: Generative AI-Based Proactive Kubernetes Container Orchestration Framework for Heterogeneous Edge Computing
Deploy-Ready IaC Generation Using Multi-Agent Systems for Cloud Deployments

clusters.name: agent_without_llm_signal
clusters.description: Agent systems (classical agents, MARL, RL) without clear LLM-driven agentic loop or marked as non-LLM-based.
example_titles: Agentic AI Decentralized Edge-Cloud Thermal Orchestration System
Utilizing LLMs for Virtual Machine Migration in Cloud Computing Environments
Intelligent Kubernetes Scheduling with Large Language Models

clusters.name: unclear_need_full_text
clusters.description: Papers with insufficient abstract signal; require full-text review to determine scope boundary.
example_titles: Accelerating Frontier MoE Training with 3D Integrated Optics
SEAL: Secure and Efficient Adaptive Layering for On-Device Language Models with TEE
Towards An Improved Video RAG Workflow With Orchestration Support in A Visual Data Management System

clusters.name: multi_agent_system_rm
clusters.description: Multi-agent systems coordinating resource management decisions, agent type unclear from abstract (may be RL/MARL or agentic).
example_titles: Simurgh: Multi-Agent Adversarial Benchmarking for Proactive Microservice Observability
Federated Synergy: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Learning for Sustainable Edge Computing in IIoT
A3CMulti-Edge: Multi-Agent Cross-Edge-Cloud Collaborative Task Scheduling Policy for Underground Coal Mine Intelligent Monitoring

clusters.name: agentic_ai_core_rm
clusters.description: Core agentic AI system where LLM-backed autonomous agent drives resource management decisions (placement, scheduling, scaling).
example_titles: Agentic AI in the Cloud: A Framework for Self-Directed Decision-Making and Optimization
Advanced Architectures Integrated With Agentic AI for Next-Generation Wireless Networks

clusters.name: edge_llm_inference
clusters.description: Edge deployment, inference optimization, or quantization of LLMs; not about resource management decisions.
example_titles: Bringing Llama-3 to the Edge: End-to-End Quantized Conversational AI on Raspberry Pi 5

clusters.name: network_telecom_5g_6g
clusters.description: Network slicing, spectrum management, or telecom infrastructure; out of cloud/edge continuum scope.
example_titles: Llama-Recipe - Fine-Tuned Meta's Llama LLM, PBOM and NFT Enabled 5G Network-Slice Orchestration and End-to-End Supply-Chain Verification Platform
